plan_title: Purchase Order Monitor + Supplier Confirmation Agent
plan_description: Searches Gmail for order emails, extracts purchase order details from attachments, drafts an HTML summary table, and replies with confirmations to suppliers.

data: - Search Gmail for emails received in the last 7 days where the subject contains the word “Orders”.
- For each matched email, collect all attachments that are: PDF, images (JPG/PNG), DOCX, or XLSX.
- Treat the collected attachments as purchase orders to be scanned for order details.
- Extract (when present) the supplier email address from the purchase order attachment content (not from the email sender).
- Extract these purchase order fields from each attachment: order date and time, order_ID, Vendor, QTY, cost, amount, status.
actions: - For each matched email, process all purchase order attachments (do not stop at the first attachment).
- Convert extracted fields into a normalized row format with these columns: order date and time, order_ID, Vendor, QTY, cost, amount, status.
- If any required field is missing or unclear in an attachment, leave the field blank and flag the row as “Needs review”.
- Build an HTML summary table containing one row per purchase order attachment.
- Reply in the same email thread with a short acknowledgement confirmation to the supplier email extracted from the purchase order attachment.
- Use a short acknowledgement confirmation message (example style): “Confirmed. We received PO {order_ID}. Thank you.”
- If the supplier email cannot be extracted from the purchase order attachment, do not send a confirmation for that purchase order and include it as “Needs review” in the summary table.
output: - Produce an HTML table embedded in the email body (not as an attachment).
- The table columns must be exactly: order date and time, order_ID, Vendor, QTY, cost, amount, status.

- Include a clear indicator in the table when a row is flagged as “Needs review” (for example, set status to “Needs review” when status is missing/unclear, or append “(Needs review)” to the status value).
delivery: - Send the HTML summary table as a new email to meiribarak@gmail.com.
- Also send the HTML summary table as a new email to eomer3@gmail.com.
- Also send the HTML summary table as a new email to offir.omer@gmail.com.
- Send supplier confirmations by replying in the same thread as the original order email.
processing_steps: - Find matching order emails (subject contains “Orders”, last 7 days).
- Download and scan all PO attachments (PDF/images/DOCX/XLSX).
- Extract structured PO fields and supplier email from each attachment.
- Normalize extracted values into consistent formats (dates, numbers, currency).
- Send the summary as a new email to the configured recipients.
- Reply in-thread to suppliers with the confirmation message when supplier email is available.

resolved_user_inputs.value: reply in same thread; short acknowledgement
leave blank and flag as Needs review
